Products.Name: PakYak Pannier Bag
Features:
Two-in-one bike pannier bag with adjustable drawcord enclosure to convert to sling-style hammock bag.
Inner Velcro closure allows you to adjust internal compartment or rolled and concealed when not in use.
Reflective details for added visibility

The storage space inside the tube offer the convenience to the rider for small personal stuff.
